negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_015
prompt: The video opens with a view of a bustling urban street, likely in London, characterized by its iconic red double-decker bus and classic architecture. The scene is set during what appears to be late afternoon or early evening, as suggested by the soft, diffused lighting. The street is lined with modern office buildings, one of which prominently features a circular design with a blue-lit top. The foreground shows a pedestrian walkway where several individuals are walking, including a man pushing an electric scooter and a woman in a patterned blouse. Cyclists can be seen riding past on the left side of the frame, and a few pedestrians are also visible in the background. The overall atmosphere is calm yet active, reflecting a typical day in a city center. Throughout the video, the scene remains largely unchanged, with minimal movement from the pedestrians and cyclists, maintaining the same composition and lighting conditions.  A medium shot captures the lively urban scene, with people walking along the sidewalk, a cyclist passing by, and the iconic red double-decker bus in the background. The modern office buildings and the circular building with the blue-lit top add architectural interest to the setting. The diffused lighting enhances the calm yet dynamic feel of the scene.
